extName.description: Extension name shown in the Chrome extensions list.

extDescription.message: Search regex patterns in the visible text of any web page. Remembers the last search and re-applies it when you navigate.
extDescription.description: Extension description shown in the Chrome Web Store and extensions list.

popupTitle.description: Title shown at the top of the popup.

inputPlaceholder.description: Placeholder shown inside the regex input field.

flagIgnoreCase.description: Label for the regex 'i' flag checkbox.

flagMultiline.description: Label for the regex 'm' flag checkbox.

flagDotAll.description: Label for the regex 's' flag checkbox. Technical term, kept as-is.

searchButton.description: Label for the main Search button.

enterPatternError.description: Error shown when the user presses Search without typing a pattern.

invalidRegexError.description: Error shown when the regex cannot be compiled.

searchingStatus.description: Status shown while the search is in progress.

noMatches.description: Status shown when the regex produced zero results.

matchCountOne.description: Status shown when exactly one match was found.

matchCountMany.description: Status shown when more than one match was found.

cannotAccessTab.description: Error shown when the extension cannot reach the active tab.

pageNotSupported.message: This page does not allow extensions
pageNotSupported.description: Error shown on chrome://, about:, and similar internal pages.

genericError.description: Generic error wrapper used for unexpected failures.

autoSearchActive.description: Badge shown under the status line while the last search is re-applied on navigation.
